summary-sub-sections.heading: business_model
summary-sub-sections.content: The business model includes an overview of activities, competencies, challenges, objectives, and organization members. It outlines procurement details such as purchasing volumes, currencies, dependencies, and key suppliers. The transformation section covers operational costs, replacement investments, capacity limits, investment projects, processes, and digitalization efforts. Sales information details products, currencies, clients, competitors, and revenue metrics, including seasonal sales differences. The ESG section highlights sustainability goals, ratings, stakeholder expectations, investment projects, desired support, and production service locations with associated operational costs.
